# Search Query Patterns for Communications Research

## General Templates

| Area | Query Pattern |
|------|--------------|
| Polar codes | `"polar code" OR "polar coding" <specific-topic>` |
| LDPC codes | `"LDPC" OR "low-density parity-check" <specific-topic>` |
| Turbo codes | `"turbo code" OR "turbo decoding" <specific-topic>` |
| MIMO detection | `"MIMO detection" OR "MIMO receiver" <specific-topic>` |
| Sphere decoding | `"sphere decoding" OR "lattice reduction" OR "tree search"` |
| Iterative decoding | `"iterative detection and decoding" OR "IDD" OR "turbo equalization"` |
| Product codes | `"product code" OR "turbo product code" OR "block turbo code"` |
| URLLC | `"ultra-reliable low-latency" OR "URLLC" <specific-topic>` |

## Venue-Specific Searches

| Venue | Query Prefix |
|-------|-------------|
| IEEE Trans. Comm. | `site:ieeexplore.ieee.org "transactions on communications"` |
| IEEE JSAC | `site:ieeexplore.ieee.org "selected areas in communications"` |
| IEEE TWC | `site:ieeexplore.ieee.org "transactions on wireless"` |
| IEEE TSP | `site:ieeexplore.ieee.org "transactions on signal processing"` |
| arXiv (IT) | `site:arxiv.org cs.IT` |
| arXiv (SP) | `site:arxiv.org eess.SP` |

## Synonym Groups

| Concept | Synonyms to Include |
|---------|-------------------|
| Low latency | `"low latency" OR "low delay" OR "real-time" OR "instantaneous"` |
| Complexity | `"complexity reduction" OR "low complexity" OR "efficient" OR "fast"` |
| Soft information | `"soft output" OR "LLR" OR "log-likelihood ratio" OR "soft decoding"` |
| Channel estimation | `"channel estimation" OR "CSI" OR "channel state information"` |
| Massive MIMO | `"massive MIMO" OR "large-scale MIMO" OR "large antenna"` |

## Citation Tracking

When you find a key paper, search for:
1. Papers that **cite** it: `<paper-title> cited by` on Google Scholar
2. Papers it **references**: Check the bibliography of the key paper
3. Papers by **same authors**: `author:"<name>"` on Google Scholar
